#  | Flowra Docs

> Flowra is institutional-grade validator infrastructure for Solana: policy-controlled block production, made accountable by an open orderflow auction.

- [Flowra Documentation](https://docs.flowra.wtf/index.md): Flowra Documentation
- [Concepts](https://docs.flowra.wtf/concepts/index.md): The ideas behind Flowra: institutional-grade validation, the Programmable Block Policy, and the open orderflow auction that makes both accountable.
- [Validators](https://docs.flowra.wtf/validators/index.md): Why run Flowra as a validator, and how to get started.
- [Searchers](https://docs.flowra.wtf/searchers/index.md): Permissionless access to Solana orderflow: standardized streams, open auctions, atomic bundles.
- [Resources](https://docs.flowra.wtf/resources/index.md): Roadmap, FAQ, and glossary.

## Concepts

- [Institutional-Grade Validation](https://docs.flowra.wtf/concepts/institutional-validation.md): What it takes for regulated operators to run Solana validators, and how Flowra provides it.
- [Programmable Block Policy (PBP)](https://docs.flowra.wtf/concepts/programmable-block-policy.md): Flowra's core feature: validator-defined, hot-reloadable rules for block composition.
- [Open Orderflow & Accountability](https://docs.flowra.wtf/concepts/open-orderflow-auction.md): Why Flowra opens the orderflow: verifiable policy enforcement first, better markets second.
- [Auction Mechanics](https://docs.flowra.wtf/concepts/auction-mechanics.md): 50 ms mini-auctions, conflict-aware selection, atomic execution, and why open competition raises tips.
- [Architecture](https://docs.flowra.wtf/concepts/architecture.md): The components that make up Flowra and how a transaction flows through them.
- [Orderflow on Solana](https://docs.flowra.wtf/concepts/orderflow-on-solana.md): What orderflow is, how it gets monetized, and why Solana's architecture makes it a dark pool.
- [The Problem](https://docs.flowra.wtf/concepts/the-problem.md): Unaccountable block production, concentrated infrastructure, and blind fees on Solana.

## Validators

- [Getting Started](https://docs.flowra.wtf/validators/getting-started.md): Onboard your validator to Flowra: registration, installation, configuration, and verification.
- [Configuration](https://docs.flowra.wtf/validators/configuration.md): Flowra Validator Client flags and the Programmable Block Policy file.
- [Endpoints & Addresses](https://docs.flowra.wtf/validators/endpoints.md): Regional Flowra endpoints and on-chain program addresses.
- [Validator FAQ](https://docs.flowra.wtf/validators/faq.md): Common questions from validator operators evaluating Flowra.

## Searchers

- [Getting Started](https://docs.flowra.wtf/searchers/getting-started.md): Authenticate against the Block Engine and make your first calls.
- [Orderflow Stream](https://docs.flowra.wtf/searchers/orderflow-stream.md): Subscribing to the pending-transaction stream: message contents and delivery semantics.
- [Bundles](https://docs.flowra.wtf/searchers/bundles.md): Bundle structure, tipping, auction submission, and best practices.
- [API Reference](https://docs.flowra.wtf/searchers/api-reference.md): gRPC services, messages, and result states for the searcher API.

## Resources

- [Roadmap](https://docs.flowra.wtf/resources/roadmap.md): Flowra's path from foundation to mainnet and beyond.
- [FAQ](https://docs.flowra.wtf/resources/faq.md): General questions about Flowra, for users, stakers, and the curious.
- [Glossary](https://docs.flowra.wtf/resources/glossary.md): Definitions of terms used throughout the Flowra documentation.
